summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
summary.en: Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

会话、消息和运行状态相关体验

  • 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、opencode 相关功能、i18n 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 hooks 相关功能、opencode 相关功能、i18n 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 project 相关功能、API 与生成契约、types 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

HagiPower / Hero 相关展示与同步细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了 HagiPower / Hero 相关展示与同步细节，提升信息一致性和可读性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、wizard 相关功能、opencode 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

模型与 Provider 相关配置细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了模型与 Provider 相关配置细节，减少接入和使用过程中的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 opencode 相关功能、i18n 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Session

  • Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Opencode, I18n.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects Hooks, Opencode, I18n.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing supporting work entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects Project, API and generated contract surfaces, Types.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

HagiPower / Hero display

  • Change Summary: Refined HagiPower / Hero display and sync details to improve consistency and readability.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, Wizard.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Model and provider configuration details

  • Change Summary: Improved model and provider configuration details to reduce integration and usage issues.
  • Impact: Affects Opencode, session workflows, Types.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing model and provider configuration details entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
